channel.title: Nye on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Nye on Have an average day :|

item.description: A new year is coming! Only two years shy of 2012. The only thing I’m worried about are the people who believe in 2012 so strongly they turn it into a self-fulfilling prophecy. Now is when I would be worried about that happening because two years is enough time to gather supplies and plan for the end game. I wonder how many people think the world is really going to end.
